i:0001.definition: Actively existing and functioning; alive and operational.

sv:𐑧.definition: And / add / join — additive; connects elements, joins sets, performs addition. As verb: to add, combine, or join. As noun: addition, union. As modifier: additive.

i:0002.definition: General reference to an unspecified individual or entity; the concept of 'someone' or 'something'.

sv:𐑰.definition: I / me — first person pronoun; subject of a clause. Object/reflexive handled by prefix system.

sv:𐑱.definition: It / they / them — third person pronoun; gender-neutral, any animacy. Number (singular/plural) handled by prefix system.

sv:𐑲.definition: But / contrast / except — contrastive; introduces opposition or exception. As verb: to contrast or oppose. As noun: exception, contrast. As modifier: contrasting, exceptional.

i:0004.definition: Anaphora — a pronoun or referential word that substitutes for a noun or noun phrase already mentioned, pointing to a prior entity in the discourse. Covers 'it', 'this', 'that', 'the aforementioned'. Operates at the level of noun replacement. Distinct from 𐑻 which navigates to a named alias or defined concept.

sv:𐑩.definition: To / at / toward — directional; marks destination or location. As verb: to go toward, to arrive. As noun: destination, goal. As modifier: directed toward.

sv:𐑦.definition: If / condition / require — conditional; introduces conditional clauses. As verb: to condition, to require. As noun: condition, requirement. As modifier: conditional, contingent.

i:0005.definition: A relationship linking two elements; setting one as condition or context for the other.

i:0006.definition: A temporal marker indicating when something occurs.

sv:𐑨.definition: Or / choose / option — disjunctive; introduces alternatives. As verb: to choose, alternate. As noun: option, alternative. As modifier: optional, alternative.

i:0007.definition: A point or period after the present; upcoming.

sv:𐑫.definition: In / enter / contain — locative; marks interior position or entry. As verb: to enter, to contain. As noun: interior, content. As modifier: inner, internal.

i:0008.definition: The extent, magnitude, or intensity of something; how much.

i:0009.definition: Relating to interior position, internal composition, or close proximity.

sv:𐑵.definition: We / us — first person plural inclusive (speaker + addressee + others).

i:0010.definition: The living, vital state of conscious existence.

i:0011.definition: A concessive connective indicating persistence despite opposition.

sv:𐑷.definition: On / upon / active — locative; marks surface contact or active state. As verb: to place on, to activate. As noun: surface, support. As modifier: upon, active, enabled.

i:0013.definition: Negation; reversing or inverting the meaning of what follows.

i:0014.definition: The state of knowing, recognizing, or understanding; awareness of a fact or situation.

sv:𐑪.definition: From / origin / source — ablative; marks starting point or origin. As verb: to originate, to depart. As noun: source, origin. As modifier: original, derived from.

i:0015.definition: The mental act of wanting, intending, or planning; directed desire toward an outcome.

i:0016.definition: A point in time relative to another; before, at, or after.

sv:𐑶.definition: Up / raise / increase — upward; marks +Z direction, multiplication by 10 per step, or increase. As verb: to raise, increase, shift up. As noun: rise, increase. As modifier: upward, more.

sv:𐑬.definition: Down / lower / decrease — downward; marks −Z direction, division by 10 per step, or decrease. As verb: to lower, decrease, shift down. As noun: fall, decrease. As modifier: downward, less.

i:0018.definition: Adequate and generally approved; meeting minimum expectations.

i:0020.definition: A condition or requirement that must be met for a result to occur.

i:0022.definition: Expressing and elaborating on the essential characteristics of a concept; to describe or characterize what something is. Covers definition as semantic elaboration of meaning. Distinct from assigning an alias or label to content.

i:0023.definition: Beyond limits; existing or acting without external constraints.

i:0024.definition: A positive indication of agreement or approval; yes.

i:0026.definition: A span of time; duration or temporal extent.

i:0027.definition: Exceptional in size, quality, or impact; great.

i:0028.definition: A relational link indicating possession, origin, causation, or association.

i:0029.definition: The process of developing and applying skills and knowledge.

i:0031.definition: Practical comprehension; grasping how something works in real-world application.

i:0030.definition: The current spatial reference point; the place being indicated.

i:0032.definition: Near or adjacent; close in space, time, or relation.

i:0033.definition: Having shared qualities; comparable or analogous to another.

i:0034.definition: A distinct span marking a stage of development.

i:0036.definition: Completely accurate and true; an exact reflection of reality.

i:0040.definition: The conveyance of meaning through spoken words; speech.

i:0041.definition: Orientation or alignment; facing toward a shared direction or purpose.

i:0042.definition: Occurring immediately after; quickly and urgently.

fw:𐑹.definition: Discourse marker: introduces a concrete example, specific instance, or illustration of the prior statement. The content following 𐑹 is a particular case of what was just said in the abstract or general. Takes a prefix indicating the grammatical role of the example. Does not open an alias span — it simply signals 'for instance'.

i:0044.definition: Mastery of knowledge and skill; expertise that enables effective action.

i:0047.definition: Enthusiastic delight or admiration; an exclamation of pleasure or surprise.

i:0051.definition: Joyful amusement and contentment; the state of laughing, smiling, and feeling satisfied.

fw:𐑸.definition: Discourse marker: opens a span of native or mixed content being assigned to an alias. The content following 𐑸 — which may be one word or many, borrowed or native — is bound to the alias root that closes the span. That alias root then stands in for the entire spanned content for the rest of the conversation. Distinct from naming or describing (i:0301, i:0022).

i:0052.definition: Very small or minimal; barely perceptible.

i:0053.definition: The point at which something concludes and ceases.

i:0054.definition: The current moment; existing or happening now.

i:0055.definition: Deep affection and romantic attachment; the feeling of loving or being loved.

i:0058.definition: A facial expression signaling interpersonal interest, emotion, or playful intent.

i:0057.definition: A means, resource, or approach that achieves a desired end.

i:0059.definition: A foundational belief, principle, or concept accepted as true and used as a basis for reasoning.

fw:𐑻.definition: Discourse marker: points backward to something already established in the conversation — a prior alias, a defined concept, or a previously named thing. Used to re-invoke content without repeating it in full. Takes a prefix for grammatical role. Operates at the discourse navigation level. Distinct from anaphoric pronouns (i:0004) which substitute at the noun level.

i:0060.definition: The outward manifestation of an intention, desire, or creative act.

i:0062.definition: Total absence, denial, or refusal; complete negation.

i:0065.definition: A vague, imprecise amount; some but not a specified quantity.

i:0067.definition: A committed relationship or bond that establishes mutual obligations.

fw:𐑽.definition: Discourse marker: introduces foreign, untranslated, or coined content. What follows is spoken in the source language or as-coined until an alias root closes the span. The prefix on 𐑽 indicates the grammatical role the borrowed content will play in the sentence. The closing alias root simultaneously ends the span and becomes the reusable handle for that content. Distinct from economic borrowing/renting (i:0944).

i:0073.definition: A systematic method or practice; procedure applied to achieve results.

i:0072.definition: Applying to each element individually; every single one.

i:0074.definition: Including every member; complete coverage of a group.

i:0075.definition: An internal space within a larger structure; a room or enclosed area.

fw:𐑺.definition: Discourse marker: signals exact, verbatim reproduction of something said or written. What follows is quoted speech or text, reproduced as originally expressed. May be closed by an alias root (assigning the quote a handle) or self-closes at the end of the quoted material when the speaker returns to prefixed native words. Distinct from the semantic quality of being literal (i:0208).

i:0078.definition: Outstanding quality; widely admired and excellent.

i:0080.definition: Inner satisfaction and readiness; the feeling of being content and capable.

i:0081.definition: A group of people united around shared interests or experiences.

i:0082.definition: A means of conveying or moving something; a carrier or channel.

i:0083.definition: The absence of any quantity; zero.

i:0084.definition: The lateral spatial dimension; the line along which left and right move.

i:0085.definition: The foundation or basis from which something arises or is supported.

i:0086.definition: Remorse or regret; the feeling arising from acknowledging an error or causing harm.

i:0087.definition: The concept of a named or identifiable entity; a person, thing, or idea that can be pointed to.

i:0088.definition: A designated area organized for gathering, habitation, or a specific purpose.

i:0090.definition: The degree or intensity of change; how much something changes.

i:0091.definition: Active engagement combining care and authority; managing and doing.

alias:1.definition: Alias root 1. A reusable conversational handle assigned by a borrow (𐑽) or phrase-alias (𐑸) span. Closes the open span and simultaneously becomes the word that represents that borrowed or aliased content for the rest of the conversation. Takes any prefix for grammatical role. Can be reassigned.

alias:2.definition: Alias root 2. A reusable conversational handle assigned by a borrow (𐑽) or phrase-alias (𐑸) span. Closes the open span and simultaneously becomes the word that represents that borrowed or aliased content for the rest of the conversation. Takes any prefix for grammatical role. Can be reassigned.

alias:3.definition: Alias root 3. A reusable conversational handle assigned by a borrow (𐑽) or phrase-alias (𐑸) span. Closes the open span and simultaneously becomes the word that represents that borrowed or aliased content for the rest of the conversation. Takes any prefix for grammatical role. Can be reassigned.

alias:4.definition: Alias root 4. A reusable conversational handle assigned by a borrow (𐑽) or phrase-alias (𐑸) span. Closes the open span and simultaneously becomes the word that represents that borrowed or aliased content for the rest of the conversation. Takes any prefix for grammatical role. Can be reassigned.

alias:5.definition: Alias root 5. A reusable conversational handle assigned by a borrow (𐑽) or phrase-alias (𐑸) span. Closes the open span and simultaneously becomes the word that represents that borrowed or aliased content for the rest of the conversation. Takes any prefix for grammatical role. Can be reassigned.

i:0092.definition: An activity involving engagement, cooperation, and interaction; a game.

i:0094.definition: A means or method by which something is accomplished; the instrument.

i:0095.definition: Specificity; identifying or singling out a particular individual or group.

i:0096.definition: Broad, unspecified collection or group; referring to items in general without specifying which.

i:0097.definition: Less far; at a smaller distance from a reference point.

i:0098.definition: The relative rank or level of something within a hierarchy or system.

i:0100.definition: On the opposite side; spanning from one limit to another.

i:0103.definition: Possibility or uncertainty; something that may or may not occur.

i:0105.definition: The visual perception of something; being seen or noticed.

i:0104.definition: Positional equality; being at the same level or extent.

i:0107.definition: An organized authority that regulates, controls, and maintains order.

i:0106.definition: A direct address or interjection used to get someone's attention.

i:0108.definition: The male gender modifier; indicating masculine biological sex. Applies to any concept to specify the male instance.

i:0109.definition: The act of changing position or state; movement of any kind.

i:0110.definition: A parent; any person who contributes to the creation or raising of offspring.

i:0111.definition: The reason or cause behind an event; expressing purpose or causation.

i:0115.definition: An additional or surplus element; more than before.

i:0116.definition: A relational or proportional connection between terms.

i:0118.definition: Economic activity; the exchange of goods and services and the flow of value.

i:0119.definition: The state of being first or earliest; the beginning.

i:0121.definition: A gap, opening, or space of separation.

i:0122.definition: A comparison of extent, degree, or manner between entities.

i:0123.definition: Lasting or enduring; persisting over time.

i:0125.definition: Charm and appealing attractiveness; the quality of being delightful or pretty.

i:0127.definition: A standard of worth or quality; an assessment of value.

i:0129.definition: An informal friendly acknowledgment of another's presence.

i:0131.definition: The state of being completely full or saturated.

i:0130.definition: A component occupying a specific position within a larger whole.

i:0132.definition: Psychological unease, fear, or anxiety; a state of inner disturbance.

i:0136.definition: A seed-bearing product of a flowering plant; the result of plant reproduction.

i:0138.definition: A systematic plan or framework organizing things into a purposeful structure.

i:0139.definition: The female gender modifier; indicating feminine biological sex. Applies to any concept to specify the female instance.

i:0140.definition: Exactness and precision; faithfully reflecting reality without ambiguity.

i:0141.definition: The state of newly discovering or perceiving something.

i:0142.definition: Becoming aware through external contact or communication.

i:0144.definition: A measured or perceived quantity; relating to number.

i:0145.definition: The source, record, or explanation of an event or condition.

i:0146.definition: The state of being distinct or uniquely individual; separateness.

i:0149.definition: Persistent existence within a larger context; membership in something ongoing.

i:0150.definition: An objectively verifiable element of reality; a fact.

i:0152.definition: The mind and its faculties; mental perception, thought, feeling, and will.

i:0154.definition: A sudden disruption causing cessation or termination.

i:0156.definition: A flaw, deficiency, or weakness that causes failure or harm.

i:0158.definition: That which comes before in time or order; preceding.

i:0160.definition: A transient moment of arrival or proximity in a sequence.

i:0162.definition: Direct personal interaction; friendship, romance, or collaboration with another.

i:0164.definition: A complete whole formed by combining all constituent parts.

i:0166.definition: Reciprocal support and fairness; what is mutually just and balanced.

i:0168.definition: A marker introducing comparison, contrast, or the next element in a sequence.

i:0169.definition: The foremost, highest-ranking, or most significant element in a context.

i:0171.definition: A sudden forceful downward transition; falling or dropping abruptly.

i:0172.definition: Powerful energy that ignites, illuminates, or destroys; fire.

i:0173.definition: The earth's fundamental terrestrial substance; the natural ground.

i:0175.definition: Achieving or bringing into existence a goal through effort.

i:0176.definition: Requesting or seeking approval, consent, or something desired.

i:0177.definition: An educational institution providing structured teaching.

i:0178.definition: Accepting or releasing; letting something go or taking it in.

i:0180.definition: Steadfast and reliable; free from doubt or wavering.

i:0183.definition: Friendly warmth and sociable good humor; the quality of being easy and pleasant to be with.

i:0181.definition: Loss, failure, or deprivation; the experience of not achieving a goal.

i:0182.definition: An additional or alternative element; something else or a different option.

i:0188.definition: The faculty of retaining and recalling past experience; the stored record of what has been experienced.

i:0186.definition: The negative Y direction; toward and behind the observer.

i:0193.definition: The male biological parent; the one who provided the fertilizing gamete.

i:0192.definition: Money; a medium of exchange used to store and transfer value.

i:0191.definition: A solemn promise or vow; a binding declaration of intent or truth.

i:0190.definition: Having stopped or departed; no longer continuing or present.

i:0195.definition: Careful attention and vigilance; watchful oversight to prevent harm or error.

i:0199.definition: The deliberate conveyance of knowledge or guidance.

i:0203.definition: Appropriate and fitting within a given context.

i:0204.definition: An exceptional innate capacity for adapting and thinking effectively.

i:0208.definition: The semantic quality of being literal — meaning exactly what is stated, without figurative, metaphorical, or embellished interpretation. Describes how an expression should be understood. Distinct from the discourse act of quoting someone verbatim.

i:0206.definition: A state of poor health or physical distress; illness.

i:0209.definition: The totality of all existence; everything that is.

i:0211.definition: Unacceptable, offensive, or disagreeable; not satisfactory.

i:0215.definition: A transaction; a mutually agreed exchange of goods, services, or value.

i:0217.definition: A transition from one state to another; change or exchange.

i:0219.definition: Final and complete; the ultimate resolution.

i:0222.definition: Of great monetary worth; valuable for purchase or trade.

i:d0.definition: The digit zero; the numeric value 0. Used in counting, scales, and numeric expressions.

i:0218.definition: A written representation of information; text.

i:0226.definition: A positive, respectful attitude conveying goodwill and admiration.

i:0228.definition: Payment for work or services; wages or compensation.

i:0229.definition: An occupation and its associated tools and effort.

i:0231.definition: A firm decision or commitment; resolving definitively on a course of action.

i:0233.definition: A self-propelled vehicle; a mode of motorized transport.

i:0237.definition: The absence of something needed or desired; lack.

i:0242.definition: An uncertain opportunity with possible reward; odds-based risk.

i:0241.definition: Complete stillness or dormancy; rest or cessation of activity.

i:0244.definition: A communicative gesture acknowledging someone's presence; a greeting.

i:0245.definition: Lighthearted, imaginative activity for fun or competition.

i:0248.definition: Overall unpleasantness or distress; pain or suffering.

i:0250.definition: Open and available to all; unrestricted.

i:0256.definition: The bond of kinship; connection through ancestry, birth, marriage, or adoption.

i:0254.definition: The state or condition that follows from an occurrence; a consequence.

i:0255.definition: A structured narrative recounting past events with purpose.

i:0261.definition: The act of giving or granting; offering something to another.

i:0266.definition: Careful evaluation of facts leading to a conclusion; reasoned judgment.

i:0267.definition: The highest position or title within an organization or context.

i:0264.definition: A competitive encounter; rivalry between opposing parties.

i:0263.definition: Persisting over time; remaining after others are gone.

i:0270.definition: Inspiring affection or admiration; evoking endearment.

i:0269.definition: Dance; rhythmic movement as artistic expression.

i:0274.definition: Assertive and duty-bound; strong in stance and imposing in obligation.

i:0272.definition: A supporting or auxiliary element that enables a larger whole.

i:0273.definition: A unified whole formed systematically from a predefined plan.

i:0276.definition: The status of being selected as the best; chosen.

i:0279.definition: Color — hue value on a 0–9 scale mapping to specific positions on the color wheel: 0=Red, 1=Orange, 2=Yellow, 3=Green, 4=Teal, 5=Cyan, 6=Blue, 7=Indigo, 8=Violet, 9=Magenta. Decimals specify blends (e.g. 0.5=Red-Orange, 2.5=Yellow-Green). Optionally followed by lightness (0–4, default 2) and saturation (5–9, default 9). Example: color[6] = blue, color[6·0·9] = navy, color[6·4·6] = baby blue.

i:0283.definition: A state of being held, supported, or in a particular position.

i:0285.definition: A location used for habitation; a home or dwelling place.

i:0288.definition: Pleasing sweetness; a quality that evokes enjoyment, affection, and contentment.

i:0291.definition: Quantity of matter in an object. Base unit: gram.

i:0295.definition: Intense pleasurable stimulation; a heightened state of feeling.

i:0294.definition: A linear series of connections constraining freedom of movement.

i:0299.definition: The positive Y direction; ahead, toward the front.

i:0302.definition: Inner strength and resolve in the face of difficulty; the capacity to persist through hardship.

i:0303.definition: Victorious; the state of having won or achieved superiority.

i:0301.definition: A proper name, title, or formal identifier assigned to a person, place, or thing to mark its identity or status. Covers naming as a semantic act — what something is called in the world. Distinct from the discourse operation of aliasing a phrase.

i:0304.definition: Support, defense, or backing for something; acting on behalf of.

i:0307.definition: Having recognized worth or status; important and esteemed.

i:d1.definition: The digit one; the numeric value 1. A single unit.

i:0309.definition: Prohibited; contrary to established rules or standards.

i:0311.definition: A unit of time equal to one-sixtieth of a minute; a very brief moment.

i:0314.definition: The act of assuming something as a starting point; reasoned presumption within logical bounds.

i:0313.definition: Skilled coordination of resources toward a desired outcome.

i:0315.definition: Ongoing supportive influence encouraging growth and development.

i:0321.definition: The capacity for strength, influence, or control; the ability to act or cause change.

i:0325.definition: The period of darkness from sunset to sunrise.

i:0328.definition: A passage or gateway enabling movement between spaces.

i:0326.definition: The quality of floating or fluid movement above or through a medium.

i:0334.definition: The concept of two; a pair or dual quantity.

i:0335.definition: Timely advantage; favorable circumstances for action.

i:0333.definition: Any single item chosen from a set of alternatives.

i:0336.definition: Creative imagination and skill in devising and executing ideas.

i:0332.definition: A social gathering centered on shared eating.

i:0339.definition: Failure to retain or recall; the state of having forgotten something.

i:0347.definition: Relating to commercial or industrial activity.

i:0343.definition: Clearly evident and precisely defined; leaving no doubt.

i:0338.definition: The period of daylight from sunrise to sunset; a full 24-hour cycle.

i:0345.definition: Relating to transformation; the alteration of form or appearance.

i:0337.definition: A defined area or bounded region with specific characteristics.

i:0346.definition: At the greatest distance from center; extreme.

i:0357.definition: An abstract standard or reference point defining a level or category.

i:0367.definition: Disappointment and loss of hope; the feeling when expectations are not met.

i:0360.definition: An informal, egalitarian address used between people on equal footing.

i:0358.definition: Fairness, entitlement, and adherence to accepted principles; what is just and right.

i:0362.definition: A person who teaches in an academic setting.

i:0363.definition: Packing or filling a space to capacity; stuffing.

i:0361.definition: Lacking firmness or support; weak or flaccid.

i:0368.definition: A young or immature person; a child or youth who is a descendant.

i:0371.definition: Waking up; transitioning from sleep to an alert, active state.

i:0373.definition: Resulting in the attainment of objectives; successful.

i:0374.definition: An organized set of units in sequence or grouping; a list or series.

i:0369.definition: The capacity to adjust and endure across varied contexts.

i:0372.definition: Deliberate, expressive manipulation of sensory elements in the arts.

i:0376.definition: Shared participation by a group in an activity or endeavor.

i:0382.definition: A forceful throw or ejection; projecting something with force.

i:0381.definition: Becoming better; the process of improvement.

i:0384.definition: A medium that records images using light; photography or film.

i:0387.definition: The concept of holding items together for transport or display.

i:0398.definition: Producing strong emotional excitement; thrilling and electrifying.

i:0400.definition: Favorable outcome; resulting from luck or good circumstances.

i:0394.definition: Cold, bleak, and dry; harsh and lacking warmth.

i:0399.definition: Treatment aimed at restoring health and relieving symptoms.

i:0396.definition: A small portion of food; a snack or appetizer.

i:0389.definition: Divided into parts; the per-unit or fractional concept.

i:0393.definition: At or forming the extreme boundary separating two areas.

i:0409.definition: A protective barrier or assurance against harm or uncertainty.

i:0405.definition: Moving something from one place to another; sending or delivering.

i:0410.definition: Cultivated plant matter for consumption; produce.

i:0424.definition: The availability of goods or services for purchase; the marketplace.

i:0418.definition: A collective grouping united around shared purposes or goals.

i:0413.definition: The moment or point of creation or origin.

i:0426.definition: Relating to the body in accordance with medical principles.

i:0432.definition: A false statement; deception or lying.

i:0430.definition: A visual depiction created through lines, paint, or other means.

i:0431.definition: Persistent inquiry aimed at uncovering truth through examination.

i:0440.definition: An unspecified single point in time; once.

i:0442.definition: Assistance that promotes personal or social well-being.

i:0450.definition: Consistent hard or manual labor, often under another's direction.

i:0448.definition: A sustained record of victories; continuous success.

i:0447.definition: Providing safety or protection through containment or locking.

i:0449.definition: An internal mental image or concept; visualization.

i:0452.definition: Force applied per unit area. Base unit: pascal.

i:0463.definition: Persistent irritation or frustration caused by something unpleasant.

i:0464.definition: The highest-ranking individual who leads and directs an organization.

i:0453.definition: A relative degree or proportion between states; a ratio or rate.

i:0461.definition: An area dominated by trees and shrubs; a forest or woodland.

i:0456.definition: Able to be grasped by hand or arm.

i:0458.definition: The muscular organ pumping blood through the body.

i:0480.definition: Steadfast loyalty or faithfulness; unwavering allegiance and dedication to a person, cause, or principle.

i:0466.definition: Lively, animating vitality; an energizing quality that sustains presence.

i:0483.definition: A period of legally mandated confinement; imprisonment.

i:0473.definition: Smooth, gentle, and uncomplicated; the earliest or simplest form.

i:0472.definition: The terminal part of the arm used for grasping and manipulation.

i:0471.definition: The primary daily eating occasion; a main meal.

i:0493.definition: Profound devotion and reverence; deeply pious and morally earnest.

i:0489.definition: A blockage preventing movement, flow, or access.

i:0494.definition: Evading responsibility or compliance through cleverness.

i:0495.definition: The atmospheric conditions at a specific time and place; weather.

i:0491.definition: Filamentous growth on mammalian skin; hair.

i:d2.definition: The digit two; the numeric value 2.

i:0492.definition: A bodily yearning for food; hunger.

i:0507.definition: A mental construct; an idea or image formed in the mind, real or imagined.

i:0510.definition: Acquiring and supplying everyday food and household items.

i:0499.definition: A position between extremes; a midpoint or average.

i:0522.definition: An intense longing or craving; strong desire for something not yet had.

i:0517.definition: Social; relating to interaction and conduct between individuals.

i:0514.definition: Being placed or held in a specific location or posture.

i:0521.definition: The state of lacking moisture; dry.

i:0516.definition: A written unit representing sound or meaning; a word or letter.

i:0515.definition: A person formally enrolled in an educational institution.

i:0524.definition: Conveying facts or details to another; informing.

i:0532.definition: An entity that offers goods or services; a business or customer.

i:0525.definition: A sudden, intense disturbance or shock; an overwhelming disruption.

i:0527.definition: A defined geographic area with a concentration of people; a town or city.

i:0539.definition: A small domesticated feline; the cat.

i:0536.definition: The upper limb from shoulder to wrist.

i:0562.definition: Gratitude; the feeling of thankfulness and appreciation toward someone or something.

i:0560.definition: Humiliation and embarrassment; intense self-conscious distress at having been shamed.

i:0561.definition: Jealousy and ill will toward another's success or possessions; resentful envy.

i:0564.definition: A disposition toward interaction and association with others.

i:0549.definition: A substance absorbed by the body; food, drink, or drug.

i:0572.definition: A sibling or person of shared lineage; a non-hierarchical family relationship.

i:0585.definition: The net positive result after all costs; profit or surplus.

i:0573.definition: The supreme moral or divine principle; ultimate good opposing evil.

i:0575.definition: Accountability for fulfilling obligations; being responsible for a task.

i:0577.definition: A unit of time equal to sixty minutes.

i:0574.definition: A recurring or renewed process; repetition and return.

i:0590.definition: A vocal expression through spoken or sung words; a name or song.

i:0583.definition: A naturally occurring fluid essential for life; water.

i:0602.definition: An audible vibration conveying linguistic or tonal content; sound or voice.

i:0593.definition: Grayscale — achromatic brightness on a 0–9 scale independent of hue: 0=black, 9=white, 4–5=mid gray. Used when no hue is present. Distinct from the lightness modifier used within a hue expression.

i:0609.definition: A spouse; one who shares a recognized partnership or marital union.

i:0619.definition: Accountability for one's actions; moral and legal responsibility.

i:0625.definition: The formal process of adjudicating disputes and determining rights.

i:0621.definition: An organized system for storing and arranging items.

i:0628.definition: Applying force to move rapidly; driving a vehicle.

i:0626.definition: A gaseous chemical substance; relating to gas.

i:1929.definition: To be; the copula linking a subject to a predicate or state. Pure existence or identity: X is Y, to exist as, to be in a state. Covers 'is', 'are', 'was', 'am' in their linking rather than actional sense.

i:1930.definition: Life stage — position in the arc of a life on a 0–9 scale: 0=newborn/beginning of life, 1–2=infant/toddler, 3–4=child/youth, 5=adult, 6–7=middle age, 8=elderly, 9=end of life. Decimals allow fine gradation. Applies to any living thing. Example: life[0]=newborn, life[3]=young, life[5]=adult, life[8]=old.

i:1888.definition: The uppermost body part containing the brain and major sense organs.

i:1931.definition: Color lightness — the brightness dimension within a hue expression, on a 0–4 scale: 0=very dark, 1=dark, 2=mid (default), 3=light, 4=very light. The second parameter in color[hue·lightness·saturation].

i:1932.definition: Color saturation — the vividness or purity dimension within a hue expression, on a 5–9 scale: 5=near gray/desaturated, 6=dull, 7=moderate, 8=vivid, 9=pure/fully saturated (default). The third parameter in color[hue·lightness·saturation].

i:1909.definition: Distance traveled per unit time. Base unit: meter per second.

i:1910.definition: Push or pull between objects. Base unit: newton.

i:1911.definition: Capacity to do work or cause change. Base unit: joule.

i:1912.definition: Rotational extent between two lines. Base unit: degree.

i:1913.definition: Thermal energy or heat intensity. Base unit: degree Celsius.

i:1917.definition: The −X direction; toward the observer's left.

i:0797.definition: The depth spatial dimension; the Y axis going forward and backward.
